_publications._publicationTitle: Impact of MEK Inhibitor Therapy on Neurocognitive Functioning in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Analysis of changes in Cogstate working memory (one-back task [ONB] speed) and visual learning/memory (one-card learning task [OCL]) did not reveal a significant change in performance from pretreatment to 24- or 48-week follow-up
details: Analysis of Cogstate working memory (one-back task speed) and visual learning/memory (one-card learning task) did not reveal significant change from pretreatment to 24- or 48-week follow-up (ONB speed: F(1,56) = 0.50, p = 0.48, d = 0.08; F(1,38) = 0.34, p = 0.57, d = −0.06; OCL: F(1,55) = −0.46, p = 0.653, d = 0.07; F(1,38) = 0.00, p = 0.96, d = 0.01)
